---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'type/feat'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or Use Case
Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case for this feature.

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches or workarounds have you considered?

## Privacy & Security Considerations
How does this feature affect user privacy or security? Does it align with SafeExtensions' privacy-first principles?

## Additional Context
Any other information, mockups, or examples that help explain the feature.

## Willing to Contribute?
Are you willing to work on this feature? (Yes/No/Maybe)
